mapper.select: SELECT c.category, SUM(k.amount) AS total FROM kakeibo k JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.username = #{username} AND k.soft_delete = 1 AND k.trade_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND c.in_out = 'out' GROUP BY c.category ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT to_char(k.trade_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, c.category, SUM(k.amount) AS total FROM kakeibo k JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.username = #{username} AND k.soft_delete = 1 AND c.in_out = 'out' GROUP BY month, c.category ORDER BY month

SELECT to_char(k.trade_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(CASE WHEN c.in_out = 'in' THEN k.amount ELSE 0 END) AS income, SUM(CASE WHEN c.in_out = 'out' THEN k.amount ELSE 0 END) AS expense FROM kakeibo k JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.username = #{username} AND k.soft_delete = 1 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
